title: Newsletter Engine - Research
description: Research sessions performed by the Newsletter Draft Engine plugin. Tracks topics researched, sources searched, findings extracted, and key themes identified. Created on first run via lazy DB creation.

Topic.description: The research topic being investigated for newsletter content.

Date Range.description: Time window searched for findings, e.g., 'Last 14 days' or 'Last 7 days'.

Total Findings.description: Count of distinct findings extracted from the research session.

Sources Searched.description: Which source platforms were queried during research.

Key Themes.description: Comma-separated themes identified across findings, used for newsletter angle selection.

Findings Summary.description: Brief summary of the top findings from the research session.

Researched At.description: Timestamp when the research session was performed.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name before creating it (lazy creation). Topic serves as the primary identifier for research sessions. Re-running research on the same topic updates the existing record rather than creating a duplicate (idempotent).
